nasb.text: Your ways and your deeds Have brought these things to you. This is your evil. How bitter! How it has touched your heart!”

esv.text: Your ways and your deeds have brought this upon you. This is your doom, and it is bitter; it has reached your very heart.”

cnv.text: “你這一切災禍是你的所作所為作成的， 這就是你的惡果， 實在是苦，直透心底。”

ccb.text: 你的所作所为给你招致这灾祸， 是你自食恶果，你会痛彻心肺！”
